packageRules.description: Frozen major — Kendo Angular UI components (v24).
Frozen major — Kendo low-level libs on v1 (data-query, drawing, licensing).

Frozen major — Angular runtime + build toolchain + Native Federation (shared with the host via Module Federation: shareAll singleton strictVersion; a major mismatch crashes host/remote). Kept last: Renovate's allowedVersions rules interact by order, and the broadest cap must win. In-major minor/patch (incl. security) updates still flow; a CVE whose only fix is a forbidden major is left for a human.
